title: Madh Fort
tagline: Madh Fort — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Madh (Marathi pronunciation: [məɖʱ]) is a peninsular locality in the northern part of the Mumbai Suburban District, Maharashtra, India.
overview.description: Madh (Marathi pronunciation: [məɖʱ]) is a peninsular locality in the northern part of the Mumbai Suburban District, Maharashtra, India. Historically, it was an island, but land reclamations in the 20th century connected it to Malad village on Salsette Island.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

nearestAirport.name: Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Malad Creek
topPlaces.description: Malad Creek or Marve Creek is a creek in north-west Mumbai. Located west of Malad, the Oshiwara River drains into it.

topPlaces.name: Ambu Island
topPlaces.description: Ambu Island (Mehti Khade) is an island off the coast of Mumbai near Madh Island located at 19.1333°N 72.7833°E / 19.1333; 72.7833 in the Arabian Sea. The isle is accessible during low tide across a rocky isthmus.

topPlaces.name: Aram Nagar
topPlaces.description: Aram Nagar is a neighborhood in Andheri, a suburb of Mumbai in India. It spans 20 acres and is located adjacent to Versova, in Andheri West of Mumbai.

topPlaces.name: Seven Bungalows
topPlaces.description: Saat Bangla also known as Seven Bungalows is a neighbourhood in Versova, Andheri, Mumbai.

topPlaces.name: Versova metro station
topPlaces.description: Versova is the elevated western terminal metro station on the East-West Corridor of the Blue Line 1 of Mumbai Metro serving the Seven Bungalows, Yari Road and Versova neighbourhoods of Andheri in Mumbai, India. It opened to the public on 8 June 2014 and consists of two side platforms.

topPlaces.name: Versova, Mumbai
topPlaces.description: Versova (ISO: Varsovā, pronounced [ʋəɾsoːʋaː]) is an upmarket neighborhood in north-western Mumbai. It is known for its beach and the Versova Fort.

topPlaces.name: Four Bungalows
topPlaces.description: Four Bungalows is a neighbourhood in Mumbai, India. It is located about three kilometres from Andheri station and is in the vicinity of Lokhandwala Complex and Seven Bungalows.

topPlaces.name: Lokhandwala Complex
topPlaces.description: Lokhandwala Complex, also known as Lokhandwala, is a large, upmarket, and affluent residential and commercial neighbourhood in the Andheri West suburb in Mumbai, India. It is approximately 5 km from the Andheri station.

items.note: Malad Creek or Marve Creek is a creek in north-west Mumbai. Located west of Malad, the Oshiwara River drains into it.

Ambu Island (Mehti Khade) is an island off the coast of Mumbai near Madh Island located at 19.1333°N 72.7833°E / 19.1333; 72.7833 in the Arabian Sea. The isle is accessible during low tide across a rocky isthmus.

Four Bungalows is a neighbourhood in Mumbai, India. It is located about three kilometres from Andheri station and is in the vicinity of Lokhandwala Complex and Seven Bungalows.

Lokhandwala Complex, also known as Lokhandwala, is a large, upmarket, and affluent residential and commercial neighbourhood in the Andheri West suburb in Mumbai, India. It is approximately 5 km from the Andheri station.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Madh Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Madh Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Madh Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai (9 km) and the nearest railway station is Mumbai CSMT (22 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Madh Fort?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Madh Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Madh Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Madh Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Madh Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Malad Creek, Ambu Island, Aram Nagar, Seven Bungalows, Versova metro station.
